summary: Verified paginated transactions endpoint & UI for 254, LLC (1871 transactions). Backend: 6/6 pytest cases passed - default limit=250 returns 1871 total across 8 pages, last page returns partial 121 items, page>pages returns [], limit=0 returns full 1871, needs_review=true paginates 198 filtered items, page=2 rows disjoint from page=1. Frontend: pagination bar renders 'Showing X-Y of TOTAL' correctly, page size dropdown has 50/100/250/500, Prev disabled on page 1 with Next enabled, clicking Next advances to 'Showing 251-500 of 1,871' and enables Prev, first row changes across pages, All chip shows 1871, changing page size resets to page 1, clicking Needs Review resets to page 1 and shows 198 total.
critical_code_review_comments: Transactions.jsx has two useEffects for [page, pageSize, currentId, filter] and [filter, pageSize, currentId]; the second setPage(1) is a follow-up render that triggers an extra fetch. Functionally correct but causes a duplicate GET on filter/pageSize change. Consider consolidating page-reset logic before dispatching the load.

Backend clamps limit to [0,5000] and page>=1; good. Consider adding sort tie-breaker on _id to prevent duplicate rows across pages when many records share the same date (currently sort by date desc only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company switcher options do NOT carry data-testid='company-switcher-option'. To switch use: click '[data-testid=company-switcher]' then page.get_by_text('254, LLC', exact=True).click(force=True).
